spec.title: HTTP Req / s
spec.description: Monitor HTTP request throughput from the real harness_monitor_http_requests_total metric.

spec.title: WS Connections
spec.description: Current total live WebSocket connections held by Harness Monitor clients.

spec.title: Resident Memory
spec.description: Current total resident memory across live Harness Monitor clients.

spec.title: Virtual Memory
spec.description: Current total virtual memory across live Harness Monitor clients.

spec.title: Lifecycle Events / 5m
spec.description: Lifecycle and interaction observations captured in the last five minutes, including short-lived monitor clients that only export once.

spec.title: Cache and API Pressure
spec.description: API errors, cache miss ratio, and cache read p95 captured in the last five minutes, including short-lived monitor clients that only export once.

spec.expr: (sum(clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m]), 0)) / clamp_min(sum(clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_hits_total[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_hits_total[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_hits_total[5m]), 0)) + sum(clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m]), 0)), 0.000001)) * 100

((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_read_duration_ms_bucket[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_read_duration_ms_bucket[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_read_duration_ms_bucket[5m]), 0))) and on() (sum(clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_read_duration_ms_count[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_read_duration_ms_count[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_read_duration_ms_count[5m]), 0)) > 0)) or on() vector(0))

spec.title: Bootstrap p95
spec.description: Bootstrap p95 latency from the last five minutes, including short-lived monitor clients that only export once.

spec.expr: ((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_bootstrap_duration_ms_bucket[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_bootstrap_duration_ms_bucket[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_bootstrap_duration_ms_bucket[5m]), 0))) and on() (sum(clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_bootstrap_duration_ms_count[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_bootstrap_duration_ms_count[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_bootstrap_duration_ms_count[5m]), 0)) > 0)) or on() vector(0))

spec.title: Cache Miss %
spec.description: Cache miss ratio over the last five minutes, including short-lived monitor clients that only export once.

spec.expr: ((((sum(clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m]), 0)) / clamp_min(sum(clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_hits_total[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_hits_total[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_hits_total[5m]), 0)) + sum(clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_cache_misses_total[5m]), 0)), 0.000001)) * 100) or on() vector(0)))

spec.title: API Errors / 5m
spec.description: API transport errors recorded in the last five minutes, including short-lived monitor clients that only export once.

spec.title: User Interactions / 5m
spec.description: User interactions recorded in the last five minutes, including short-lived monitor clients that only export once.

spec.title: Interaction p95
spec.description: Interaction p95 latency from the last five minutes, including short-lived monitor clients that only export once.

spec.expr: ((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_user_interaction_duration_ms_bucket[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_user_interaction_duration_ms_bucket[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_user_interaction_duration_ms_bucket[5m]), 0))) and on() (sum(clamp_min((last_over_time(harness_monitor_user_interaction_duration_ms_count[5m]) - last_over_time(harness_monitor_user_interaction_duration_ms_count[5m] offset 5m)) or last_over_time(harness_monitor_user_interaction_duration_ms_count[5m]), 0)) > 0)) or on() vector(0))

spec.title: HTTP p95
spec.description: Monitor HTTP p95 latency from the millisecond histogram family.

spec.expr: ((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(harness_monitor_http_request_duration_ms_bucket{url_path=~"${url_path:regex}"}[5m]))) and on() (sum(rate(harness_monitor_http_request_duration_ms_count{url_path=~"${url_path:regex}"}[5m])) > 0)) or on() vector(0))

spec.title: Decoding Errors / 5m
spec.description: Decoding errors recorded in the last five minutes, including short-lived monitor clients that only export once.

spec.title: Timeout Errors / 5m
spec.description: Timeout errors recorded in the last five minutes, including short-lived monitor clients that only export once.

spec.title: WS Connects / s
spec.description: WebSocket reconnect and start counters. This remains empty until the monitor exercises the daemon socket path.

spec.title: WS RPC p95
spec.description: WebSocket RPC p95 latency. Empty until monitor websocket RPCs are exercised.

spec.expr: ((histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(harness_monitor_websocket_rpc_duration_ms_bucket[5m]))) and on() (sum(rate(harness_monitor_websocket_rpc_duration_ms_count[5m])) > 0)) or on() vector(0))

spec.title: HTTP Rate by Path and Status
spec.description: HTTP throughput by path and status code.

spec.title: HTTP p95 by Path
spec.description: HTTP p95 latency by path.

spec.title: WebSocket Signals
spec.description: WebSocket signals by outcome and RPC failure state.

spec.title: Monitor Logs
spec.description: Harness Monitor logs for the selected severity levels.

spec.title: Active Tasks
spec.description: Current total open tasks reported by live Harness Monitor clients.
